summary: Clones Daily Logs from one Date to another Date
description: Clones Daily Logs of the given log_types from the from_date to the to_date.

schema.description:
An object where keys represent the copied log types, and their
values are arrays of the newly-copied logs. The object will be
empty if no logs are copied, such as when the to_date is
already comple...

400.description:
Request is invalid. The dates may be out-of-order or in the future,
the log types might be invalid, or the specified log types may not
belong to the provided daily_log_segment_id.

403.description: User does not have right permissions.

from_date.description: Date to copy logs from in YYYY-MM-DD format

to_date.description: Date to copy logs to in YYYY-MM-DD format

log_types.description: Log types to copy. More than one log type can be provided.

daily_log_segment_id.description:
Optional. The ID of the daily log area to filter logs by. 
Only logs belonging to the specified area will be copied.
If the area has associated log types, only those log types will be allowed.
